'''kachuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iyng|iyng]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iyng|iyng]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kachuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæchizith|kæchizith]] || [[word:kæchizij|kæchizij]] || [[word:kæchizish|kæchizish]] || [[word:kæchizi|kæchizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kachuchuzuth|kachuchuzuth]] || [[word:kachuchuzuj|kachuchuzuj]] || [[word:kachuchuzush|kachuchuzush]] || [[word:kachuchuzu|kachuchuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kachuzuth|kachuzuth]] || [[word:kachuzuj|kachuzuj]] || [[word:kachuzush|kachuzush]] || [[word:kachuzu|kachuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kachufzuth|kachufzuth]] || [[word:kachufzuj|kachufzuj]] || [[word:kachufzush|kachufzush]] || [[word:kachufzuf|kachufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kachuzuthu|kachuzuthu]] || [[word:kachuzuju|kachuzuju]] || [[word:kachuzushu|kachuzushu]] || [[word:kachuzuku|kachuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kachuzuth|kachuzuth]] || [[word:kachuzuj|kachuzuj]] || [[word:kachuzush|kachuzush]] || [[word:kachuzu|kachuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kachuzuthul|kachuzuthul]] || [[word:kachuzujul|kachuzujul]] || [[word:kachuzushul|kachuzushul]] || [[word:kachuzukul|kachuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kachuzuthuthu|kachuzuthuthu]] || [[word:kachuzujuju|kachuzujuju]] || [[word:kachuzushushu|kachuzushushu]] || [[word:kachuzuku|kachuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kachuzuthun|kachuzuthun]] || [[word:kachuzujun|kachuzujun]] || [[word:kachuzushun|kachuzushun]] || [[word:kachuzukun|kachuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kachuzuthuoro|kachuzuthuoro]] || [[word:kachuzujuoro|kachuzujuoro]] || [[word:kachuzushuoro|kachuzushuoro]] || [[word:kachuzukuoro|kachuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
